result.stdout:
usage: atl [-h | --help] <command>

Atlantis CLI - Tools for Atlantis development

Options:
    -h, --help  Show help information.

Commands:
    init  Create a new Atlantis project
    bindgen  Generate JavaScript/TypeScript bindings from [JSExport] methods
    build  Build the Atlantis project for deployment
    update  Update atl to the latest version
    run  Run the Atlantis application
    fix  Apply code fixes for Atlantis migration issues

commands.payload:
usage: atl [-h | --help] <command>

Atlantis CLI - Tools for Atlantis development

Options:
    -h, --help  Show help information.

Commands:
    init  Create a new Atlantis project
    bindgen  Generate JavaScript/TypeScript bindings from [JSExport] methods
    build  Build the Atlantis project for deployment
    update  Update atl to the latest version
    run  Run the Atlantis application
    fix  Apply code fixes for Atlantis migration issues

result.stdout:
usage: atl bindgen [-s | --source <source>] [-o | --output <output>] [-h | 
--help]

Generate JavaScript/TypeScript bindings from [JSExport] methods

Options:
    -s, --source  <source>  Source directory containing C# files
    -o, --output  <output>  Output directory for generated files
    -h, --help  Show help information.

commands.payload:
usage: atl bindgen [-s | --source <source>] [-o | --output <output>] [-h | 
--help]

Generate JavaScript/TypeScript bindings from [JSExport] methods

Options:
    -s, --source  <source>  Source directory containing C# files
    -o, --output  <output>  Output directory for generated files
    -h, --help  Show help information.

result.stdout:
usage: atl build [-p | --project <project>] [-r | --rid <rid>] [-c | 
--configuration <configuration>] [-v | --verbose] [-h | --help]

Build the Atlantis project for deployment

Options:
    -p, --project  <project>  Path to the .csproj file (auto-detected if not 
specified)
    -r, --rid  <rid>  Runtime identifier for cross-compilation (e.g., win-x64, 
linux-x64, osx-arm64)
    -c, --configuration  <configuration>  Build configuration (default: Release)
    -v, --verbose  Show verbose output
    -h, --help  Show help information.

commands.payload:
usage: atl build [-p | --project <project>] [-r | --rid <rid>] [-c | 
--configuration <configuration>] [-v | --verbose] [-h | --help]

Build the Atlantis project for deployment

Options:
    -p, --project  <project>  Path to the .csproj file (auto-detected if not 
specified)
    -r, --rid  <rid>  Runtime identifier for cross-compilation (e.g., win-x64, 
linux-x64, osx-arm64)
    -c, --configuration  <configuration>  Build configuration (default: Release)
    -v, --verbose  Show verbose output
    -h, --help  Show help information.

result.stdout:
usage: atl fix [-p | --project <project>] [--dry-run] [-v | --verbose] [-h | 
--help]

Apply code fixes for Atlantis migration issues

Options:
    -p, --project  <project>  Path to the .csproj file (auto-detected if not 
specified)
    --dry-run  Show what would be fixed without making changes
    -v, --verbose  Show verbose output
    -h, --help  Show help information.

commands.payload:
usage: atl fix [-p | --project <project>] [--dry-run] [-v | --verbose] [-h | 
--help]

Apply code fixes for Atlantis migration issues

Options:
    -p, --project  <project>  Path to the .csproj file (auto-detected if not 
specified)
    --dry-run  Show what would be fixed without making changes
    -v, --verbose  Show verbose output
    -h, --help  Show help information.

result.stdout:
usage: atl init [-o | --output <output>] [-h | --help] <name>

Create a new Atlantis project

Arguments:
    <name>  Name of the project to create

Options:
    -o, --output  <output>  Output directory (defaults to current directory)
    -h, --help  Show help information.

commands.payload:
usage: atl init [-o | --output <output>] [-h | --help] <name>

Create a new Atlantis project

Arguments:
    <name>  Name of the project to create

Options:
    -o, --output  <output>  Output directory (defaults to current directory)
    -h, --help  Show help information.

result.stdout:
usage: atl run [-p | --project <project>] [-c | --configuration <configuration>]
[-v | --verbose] [-h | --help] <args>

Run the Atlantis application

Arguments:
    <args>  Arguments to pass to the application

Options:
    -p, --project  <project>  Path to the .csproj file (auto-detected if not 
specified)
    -c, --configuration  <configuration>  Build configuration (default: Debug)
    -v, --verbose  Show verbose output
    -h, --help  Show help information.

commands.payload:
usage: atl run [-p | --project <project>] [-c | --configuration <configuration>]
[-v | --verbose] [-h | --help] <args>

Run the Atlantis application

Arguments:
    <args>  Arguments to pass to the application

Options:
    -p, --project  <project>  Path to the .csproj file (auto-detected if not 
specified)
    -c, --configuration  <configuration>  Build configuration (default: Debug)
    -v, --verbose  Show verbose output
    -h, --help  Show help information.

result.stdout:
usage: atl update [--check] [-v | --verbose] [-h | --help]

Update atl to the latest version

Options:
    --check  Check for updates without installing
    -v, --verbose  Show verbose output
    -h, --help  Show help information.

commands.payload:
